---
title: "Tiny C Projects"
description: "My notes & review of [Tiny C Projects](https://www.amazon.com/Tiny-C-Projects-Dan-Gookin/dp/1633439828/ref=tmm_pap_swatch_0) by Dan Gookin"
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-06-26"
image: "./cover.jpg"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/tiny-c-projects"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Tiny C Projects, In Progress]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes 

## Overview

[My repo to follow along](https://github.com/TylerHillery/tiny-c-projects)
